title: Gingerbread Boxed Candle, Glass and Wax, 7x7x7.5cm, 130g, Christmas Theme
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Features a charming gingerbread-themed pattern with gingerbread men, stars, candy canes, and holly decorations perfect for creating a warm Christmas atmosphere
PREMIUM MATERIALS: Crafted from 50% high-quality glass and 50% wax for a clean, even burn and elegant presentation
COMPACT SIZE: Measures approximately 7 x 7 x 7.5 cm, making it ideal for mantlepieces, dining tables, windowsills, or as a decorative accent in any room
GIFT-READY PACKAGING: Comes in a beautiful festive box with coordinating gingerbread print, perfect for gifting during the holiday season
LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: Weighs approximately 130g, easy to move and position throughout your home to spread seasonal cheer
description: This charming Gingerbread Boxed Candle brings the warmth and nostalgia of the festive season into your home. Featuring a delightful gingerbread-themed design with cheerful illustrations of gingerbread men, stars, candy canes, and holly, this candle captures the essence of Christmas baking and holiday traditions. The glass vessel showcases the whimsical pattern beautifully, making it an attractive decorative piece even when not lit. Presented in a coordinating gift box with the same festive motif, this candle makes an ideal present for loved ones or a lovely treat for yourself during the holiday season. Measuring approximately 7x7x7.5cm and weighing 130g, it's perfectly sized for mantels, side tables, or as part of a festive centrepiece. The candle is crafted from quality wax housed in a durable glass container, ensuring a clean and even burn. Whether you're creating a cosy atmosphere for family gatherings or adding a touch of seasonal cheer to your décor, this gingerbread candle fills your space with festive charm and makes every moment feel special throughout the Christmas period.
